title: Heintje: A Heart Goes on a Journey
original_title: Heintje - Ein Herz geht auf Reisen
overview: A poor orphan boy runs away from the children's home and sets up his lonely fatherly friend with his youth welfare officer. As a result, nothing stands in the way of our hero's adoption.
